name: Sun-Dried Tomato and Olive Pesto
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a strainer over a 1-cup glass measuring cup. Pour the tomatoes with their oil into the strainer to drain.
2. If necessary, add enough olive oil to the glass cup so that the total measures 1/4 cup of oil.
3. In a food processor, blend the drained tomatoes, parsley, olives, pine nuts, shallots, and garlic with the vinegar until finely chopped.
4. With the machine running, gradually add the 1/4 cup of olive oil; process the mixture until well blended.
5. If the pesto is dry, mix in more oil by spoonfuls.
6. Season with salt and pepper.
(Note: The pesto can be made ahead. Cover the surface with plastic wrap before refrigerating for up to 2 days or freezing for up to 1 week. Bring to room temperature before using.)
